title: Finite Inversion Geometry Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite inversion-geometry bad inverse-coordinate and inverse-distance-product QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact inversion replay computes inverse x-coordinate 2/5 and squared-radius product 1 for point (2,1) in the unit circle, but the malformed rows claim x-coordinate 1/2 and product 2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional inversion rows only when they add distinct circle-line, angle, cyclic-configuration, or polynomial-geometry pressure beyond inverse-coordinate and inverse-distance-product replay; keep general inversion theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed rational inversion-geometry rows as deterministic exact-coordinate replay obligations.
Replay inversion image, inverse-distance product, and collinearity witnesses over exact rationals.
Route rejected finite inverse-coordinate and inverse-distance-product claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact coordinate or scalar product.
Keep general Euclidean inversion theorems, angle preservation, circle-line correspondences, and power-of-a-point claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
